notes: Waited for the pullback and followed my plan.
Stopped out at my level. Part of the game.
Jumped right back in bigger to win it back.
Doubled down again, angry about the last two.
Chased the breakdown well after it started.
Hesitated, finally entered late in choppy tape.
Reset, waited, took the A+ setup.
Felt unstoppable after that win, went big.
Kept the size huge and gave most of it back.
Everyone was talking about it so I jumped in.
Back to my process, small and patient.
